questionHtml: Among 75-year-old lifelong non-smokers the percentage incidence of lung cancer was 0.01 %. Suggest one possible cause of lung cancer in non-smokers.
markschemeHtml: passive smoking/second hand smoke/exposure to radon/asbestos/pollution/smog/genetic predisposition ✔
